title: [FIRRTL] Chisel generates FIRRTL which fails new Cat signedness check

features.name: variadic_concatenation_mixed_signedness
features.description: Code should include a concatenation expression with more than two operands where operands have mixed signedness (some signed, some unsigned)
features.snippet: logic signed [7:0] s1; logic signed [10:0] s2; logic unsigned [7:0] u1; wire [31:0] r = {s1, s2, u1};

features.name: binary_concatenation_mixed_signedness
features.description: Code should include a two-operand concatenation where operands have opposite signedness (one signed, one unsigned)
features.snippet: logic signed [7:0] s; logic unsigned [7:0] u; wire [15:0] r = {s, u};
